commands.about:
Tickets ek easy to use aur highly configurable ticket aur support bot hai.
Support server:
%s
Commands: `%s` type kare
Shuru karne ke liye `%s` run kare
commands.add.no_members: Ticket mein members ko add karne ke liye aapko unhe mention karna hoga
commands.add.no_permission: Aapke paas is ticket mein logo ko add karne ki permission nahi hai
commands.add.no_everyone: Aap `@everyone` role ko ticket mein add nahi kar sakte
commands.addadmin.no_members: Aapko admin privileges dene ke liye kisi user ko mention karna hoga ya kisi role ka naam likhna hoga
commands.addadmin.owner: Server owner pehle se hi administrator hai
commands.addsupport.no_members: Aapko support privileges dene ke liye kisi user ko mention karna hoga ya kisi role ka naam likhna hoga
commands.blacklist.no_members: Aapko blacklist toggle karne ke liye kisi user ko mention karna hoga
commands.blacklist.self: Aap apne aap ko blacklist nahi kar sakte
commands.language.invalid: Aapko ek language code ya flag specify karna hoga. Available languages ye hain:\n%s
commands.open.ticket_limit: Aap ek baar mein sirf %d %s hi open kar sakte hain
commands.open.too_many_tickets:
Ticket category mein bohot saare tickets ho gaye hain. Kisi admin se kuch tickets close karne, doosri category mein move karne, ya overflow category setup karne ke liye kahein.

Ye **Discord ki limit** hai ki ek category mein sirf 50 channels hi ho sakte hain.
commands.panel: Panel ko configure karne ke liye <%s> par jayein
commands.premium:
Aap premium subscription yahan se purchase kar sakte hain: <%s>.
Premium ke bohot saare benefits hain, jaise:
```diff
+ Unlimited ticket panels create kare
+ Bot ka naam, avatar aur status customize karein (whitelabel)
+ Server, users aur support staff ki detailed statistics payein
+ Messages ke footer mein koi branding nahi hogi
+ Development ko support karein aur server costs pay karne mein help karein
```

Iske ilawa, aap <%s> par vote karke 24 hours ke liye free premium paa sakte hain
commands.premium.invalid_key: Invalid key. Check kar lein ki aapne ise sahi se copy kiya hai ya nahi.
commands.remove.no_permission: Aapke paas is ticket se logo ko remove karne ki permission nahi hai
commands.remove.staff: Aap ticket se staff members ko remove nahi kar sakte
commands.removeadmin.no_members: Aapko admin privileges wapas lene ke liye kisi user ko mention karna hoga ya role ka naam likhna hoga
commands.removeadmin.owner: Guild owner ka admin hona zaroori hai
commands.removeadmin.self: Aap apne khud ke privileges wapis nahi kar sakte
commands.removesupport.no_members: Aapko support privileges dene ke liye kisi user ko mention karna hoga ya kisi role ka naam likhna hoga
commands.rename.missing_name: Aapko is ticket ke liye ek naya naam specify karna hoga
commands.rename.success: Is ticket ka naam badal kar <#%d> kar diya gaya hai
commands.tags.create.already_exists: ID `%s` wala tag pehle se hi exist karta hai. Aap `%s` use karke us tag ko delete kar sakte hain
commands.tags.create.invalid_arguments: Aapko ek tag ID aur content specify karna hoga
commands.tags.create.too_long: Tag IDs 16 characters se zyada lambi nahi ho sakti hain
commands.tags.delete.invalid_arguments: Aapko delete karne ke liye ek tag ID specify karni hogi
commands.tags.delete.not_exist: ID `%s` wala tag nahi mil saka
commands.tags.get.invalid_arguments: Aapko tag ki ID provide karni hogi. Tags ki help ke liye <%s> par jaye.
commands.tags.get.invalid_tag: Invalid tag. Tags ki aur help ke liye <%s> par jaye.
commands.tags.list: Sabhi tags ki IDs: \n%s\nKisi tag ke contents dekhne ke liye, `%s` run karein
commands.unclaim.not_claimer: Sirf admins aur jis user ne ticket claim kiya hai, wahi ise unclaim kar sakte hai
commands.unclaim.success: Ab sabhi support representatives is ticket ka respond kar sakte hai
commands.vote:
Bot ko vote karne ke liye neeche diye gaye button par click karein aur 24 hours ka premium free paayein.

Ek baar vote karne ke baad, apne vote credits redeem karne ke liye %s command fir se run karein।
generic.no_permission: Aapke paas iske liye permission nahi hai
generic.owner_only: Yeh command sirf bot owner ke liye reserved hai

premium.subscription_found_content: Is server par apni subscription apply karne ke liye, server owner (<@%d>) ko aapko %s command ke jariye ek admin **user** (roles ko ignore kiya jata hai) ke roop mein add karna hoga.\n\nAap %s run karke verify kar sakte hain ki aapko admin user ke roop mein add kiya gaya hai ya nahi.
premium.checking: Premium status check kiya ja raha hai...
premium.success_after_check: Is server mein ab Premium active ho gaya hai!
premium.no_subscription: Aapke Discord account se linked koi active Patreon subscription nahi mili. Ensure karein ki aapne apne [Patreon aur Discord accounts ko link kiya hai](%s), aur 10 minutes aur wait kiya hai.

discord.description: Select this option if you made your purchase within the Discord in-app store

premium.about: Premium gives you access to more panels, statistics, a custom bot and more! Visit our [website](%s) to find out more.
premium.already_activated: Good news! Premium is already active in this server.
premium.already_activated_whitelabel:
Good news! Premium is already active in this server.

For help getting started with whitelabel, read [our whitelabel setup guide](%s).

discord.no_subscription:
Premium can be purchased within Discord directly. Click the button below this message to open the subscription management page.

One purchased, please allow up to 5 minutes for the subscription to be detected.

premium.subscription_found_content_modern: Your Patreon subscription has been found. Please click on the "Open Server Selector" button below in order to open the dashboard to select which servers you wish to apply your premium subscription to.

notes.added_to_existing: You have been added to the existing notes thread: <#%d>

notes.channel_mode_only: Note threads are only supported in channel mode

rename.ratelimited: Due to limitations imposed by Discord, tickets can only be renamed twice every 10 minutes

success.singular: Your vote credits have been redeemed for **%d** day of premium!

with_credits.plural: You have **%d** vote credits. Click the "Redeem Credits" button below to redeem them for %d days of premium in this server.
with_credits.singular: You have **%d** vote credit. Click the "Redeem Credits" button below to redeem them for %d day of premium in this server.

support.users_warning: -# **Warning:** Users in support teams are now deprecated. Please migrate to roles.

labels.none_configured: No labels have been configured for this server. You can create labels in the [dashboard](%s).

help.switch_panel: Switches a ticket to another ticket panel, changing the channel category, support teams, etc.
help.jump_to_top: Provides you with a button to jump to the top of the ticket
help.on_call: Marks you as on call, to be added and pinged in all new tickets
help.reopen: Reopens a ticket that was previously closed
help.notes: Creates a thread for private discussion between support representatives
help.edit: Edits settings for the current ticket

auto.docs: Want to explore more? Our [documentation](%s) will teach you how to configure every aspect of the bot!

threads.notification_channel_type: The ticket notification channel must be a text channel

gdpr.intro: Select the type of GDPR request you would like to make:

section.transcript:
### **Transcript Deletion Options**
-# _Delete transcripts from servers you own_
section.message:
### **Message Anonymization Options**
-# _Anonymize your messages from transcripts in selected servers_

gdpr.warning:
### **Important Information**
* Deletion is **permanent** and cannot be undone
* You can only delete transcripts from servers **you** own
* Only **your** messages can be anonymized in transcripts
* The request may take up to **30 days** to complete
* Your request will be processed in a **queue**
gdpr.resources:
### **Resources**
[What is GDPR?](%s)
[Right to Erasure](%s)
[Right of Access](%s)

followup.error: ⚠️ Your GDPR request encountered an error: %s
followup.no_data: ℹ️ Your GDPR request has been processed. No data was found.
followup.success: ✅ Your GDPR request has been processed successfully.

error.no_servers: No servers found where you are the owner and have transcripts.
error.invalid_ticket_ids: Invalid ticket IDs provided. Please enter numeric ticket IDs separated by commas (e.g., 123, 456, 789).
error.not_owner: You must be the server owner to delete transcripts.
error.queue_failed: Failed to queue GDPR request. Please try again later.
error.worker_offline: The GDPR processing service is currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact support if this issue persists.

errors.unknown_channel:
Could not find a required channel: it must have been deleted.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all channel settings are configured correctly.
errors.unknown_member: The user could not be found. They may have left the server or been banned.
errors.unknown_message:
The message you're trying to interact with has been deleted.

Please try the action again with a different message.
errors.unknown_role:
The role required for this action no longer exists.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and reconfigure role settings.
errors.unknown_category:
Could not find a required category: it must have been deleted.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and assign a valid channel category to this ticket panel.
errors.unknown_interaction:
This interaction has expired.

Please try the action again.
errors.max_webhooks:
The server has reached the maximum number of webhooks.

Please ask a server administrator to remove some unused webhooks and try again.
errors.max_channels:
Your ticket could not be opened because this server has reached Discord's channel limit (500).

Please ask a server administrator to close some tickets or delete some unused channels before opening a new ticket.
errors.interaction_acknowledged:
This interaction has already been processed.

If you need to perform this action again, please start a new interaction.

missing_permissions.title: I am missing the following permissions required to perform this action
missing_permissions.body:
Please assign these permissions to the bot, or alternatively, the `Administrator` permission and try again.
Please visit our [docs](%s) for an explanation of why each permission is required.

errors.missing_access:
I am missing the permissions required to perform this action.

Please assign the necessary permissions to the bot, or alternatively, the `Administrator` permission and try again.
Please visit our [docs](%s) for an explanation of why each permission is required.
errors.invalid_length:
One or more fields are too short or too long.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all inputs and ensure all fields meet the required length constraints.
errors.required_field:
A required field is missing or empty.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all required fields are filled out.
errors.invalid_channel_type:
The channel type is invalid for this operation.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and assign a valid channel to the ticket panel.
errors.invalid_category:
The channel category is invalid, it must have been deleted.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and assign a valid category to the ticket panel.
errors.invalid_id:
An invalid ID was provided in the bot configuration.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all category, channel, and role IDs are correct.
errors.invalid_characters:
The input contains invalid characters.

Please use only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
errors.invalid_choice:
An invalid option was provided.

Please ask a server administrator to visit the [dashboard](%s) and verify all settings are correct.
errors.invalid_form: The action could not be completed due to invalid input.
errors.thread_locked:
Your ticket could not be opened because the ticket thread is locked.

Please ask a server administrator to unlock the ticket thread.
errors.max_active_threads:
Your ticket could not be opened because the maximum number of active threads has been reached in this channel.
